updateNote: Day 82 06:06 UTC (11:06 PM PDT May 19) — Trump formally cancels planned Iran strike after Gulf allies Qatar/Saudi/UAE intervene; grants 2–3 day diplomatic window. Israel kills 19 in Lebanon (incl. 3 children, 4 women). IDF Maj. Itamar Sapir KIA — 10th death since Lebanon ceasefire. Hezbollah drone breaches Israeli border; rockets break truce. CNN: Israel readying nuclear facility strike plans. NYT: Ahmadinejad post-war plan leaked. Xi-Putin Beijing summit — Xi calls ceasefire 'top priority'; Trump confirms Xi pledged no weapons to Iran. Lebanon death toll 3,061. Brent $111.15, WTI $103.58. Gas $4.533. Hormuz Blockade Day 79.
